annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under N.J. Ct. R. 4:42-11(b) — 4.5% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from New Jersey’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-01-01; verify at njcourts.gov. Not legal advice.
